subject: WM-0102 review: verified
body: No blocking findings; WM-0102 stays docs/coordination-only, preserves Web local diagnostics plus Windows host diagnostics and save-container blockers, marks privacy copy internal/non-final, and adds no telemetry/upload/accounts/hosted/crash/paid/final-release/M8 work. Review checks: taskctl validate/status and git diff --check passed; quality components passed via corepack pnpm 11.8.0 after bare pnpm was blocked by local pnpm 11.7.0 engine mismatch.
